Who We Are

Where Strength Is
Forged & Limits Shattered

Our exclusive ladies-only gym in Yas Bay, is a space designed for privacy, vitality and progress. Our fully equipped gym features best-in-industry equipment and Warehouse's signature gym floor classes. Members will also have access to the Yas Bay mixed gym and ladies classes to further enhance their fitness experience. This ladies gym is complemented by luxurious changing facilities which feature private recovery suites with state-of-the-art IR saunas, ice baths and more.

🏋️

Elite Equipment

State-of-the-art machines and free weights for every level.

⏰

Flexible Hours

Open early mornings, late nights & weekends.

👥

Expert Coaches

Certified trainers to guide every step of your journey.

💪

Real Results

Proven programs built around your goals, not ours.
